2605.02810.title: AIs and Humans with Agency
2605.02810.paper_summary: This paper compares agency in humans with potential agency in AI programs. Human agency takes many years to develop, as the frontal lobe is activated. Early attempts to endow LLMs agency have met serious obstacles. Progress requires a new architecture where actions and plans are formulated jointly with the human actors in each real world setting.
2605.02810.paper_summary_zh: 這篇論文比較了人類的能動性與人工智慧程式的潛在能動性。人類的能動性需要多年發展，因為前額葉會被激活。早期賦予大型語言模型能動性的嘗試遇到了嚴重的障礙。進展需要一種新的架構，在每個現實世界的情境中，行動和計劃與人類參與者共同制定。
2605.02810.author: David Mumford et.al.
